item.title: Ferske spor: August 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link til Deichmans musikkblogg her . Lyra Sage – «Human» (2024) Out of the blue, came this year’s summer hit 2025. A relatively unknown artist on Spotify has filled my droplets at all times this summer. A clear and groovy beat, with room for playfulness. Take your ear canals to new musical heights. Montee – «Duality» (2023) Now for a bit of darker stuff. This bass resonates wonderfully with a shadowy vibe.
